Georgia, statewide

Divorce & Family Lawyers in Georgia

504 listings statewide

Compare top rated divorce & family lawyers across Georgia. We list 504 family & divorce practices, both established law firms and solo attorneys, with ratings, reviews, and direct contact. Georgia requires at least one spouse to have lived in the state for six months before filing for divorce. Family lawyers handle custody, child support, alimony, and the division of marital property.

Frequently asked questions

How many divorce & family lawyers are in Georgia?

Our directory lists 504 divorce & family lawyers across Georgia, ranked by rating and reviews.

What should I know before hiring a divorce & family lawyer in Georgia?

Georgia requires at least one spouse to have lived in the state for six months before filing for divorce. Family lawyers handle custody, child support, alimony, and the division of marital property.

Who is a top divorce & family lawyer in Georgia?

Anthony M. Zezima, P.C. in Lawrenceville is among the highest rated, with 5.0 stars across 59 reviews.
